title: GLM-5.2 Is The New Best Open Model
summary: GLM-5.2 Is The New Best Open Model
whyItMatters: GLM-5.2 arrived last week. It boasts excellent benchmarks and looks strong. Benchmarks here are a de facto ceiling of how good it is, not a point estimate. Essentially all other aspects of an open model like this, beyond speed and price, will almost always be worse than the numbers suggest. Still, impressive. It is definitely a large step up from GLM-5.1, a…
